## Summary

## Product Impact

- [ ] Improves usefulness, clarity, stability, onboarding, or trust.
- [ ] Keeps the CLI/API surface simple and predictable.
- [ ] Avoids unrelated refactors or new architecture.
- [ ] Updates docs/examples when user-facing behavior changes.

## Validation

- [ ] `./gradlew test installDist`
- [ ] `scripts/quickstart-smoke.sh` if CLI onboarding, README quick start, setup, verify, or Agent Gate behavior changed
- [ ] `kaios next` / `kaios bug-report` path checked if diagnostics, support, or failure handling changed
